creator: fluffy@FreeBSD.org
text:
With latest FreeBSD 9.0-900036-CURRENT #0 r221612M: Sun May 8 12:10:51 VLAST 2011  I've got too unstable wireless in my laptop with AR9285 card. 
After 1.5-2 hours of online work, it lost connection. Any attempts to restart wireless produce next lines on console until reboot:

May 8 15:24:21 Beastie kernel: [ath] Warning - initial NF calibration did not complete in time, noisy environment? 
May 8 15:24:46 Beastie kernel: ath0: device timeout

Reverted to kernel r221369M, which is more stable.
